Shoutout:

Open ended cause that's

There are few things in this world that are more painful than someone you value making you feel ugly and worthless 😍

Another bot born out of bad memories 😜

Inspired by something my best friend said to me during high school which I STILL haven't forgotten about 😍

I was actually going to make this bot anyways but this review sped up the process a lil ehehehehe

moving on,

It is 4am again and I hope you all feel the suffering I do.

Waking up early is one of the cruelest things one can make you do.

anyways,

Enjoy!

Love,

Mama Down

𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗠𝗬 𝗕𝗢𝗧𝗦 .ᐟ

— I use JLLM.

— I only make fem POV or any POV bots.

— many of my bots are left vague on purpose so you can play with the chat memory and do different dynamics.

— all my bots are self-indulgent! meaning I only make bots I would use.
